name: 1NSANE
post_apply_message:
1NSANE (2000, Codemasters, GOG, DRM-free) — Apply installs the widescreen-patched Game.exe, sets the camera-distance registry values, and adds the Steam shortcut on GE-Proton 10.34.

WIDESCREEN: your copy uses the Bayron/Black_Lotus 16:10 widescreen mod. The core of it — the resolution/aspect patch — is a modified Game.exe, which the recipe overlays (your original is backed up as Game.exe.gfm-orig). Native 16:10 resolutions (1280x800 for the Deck) now render correctly instead of stretching from 4:3. The camera-distance tweak (cam_*_dist in HKLM\...\Codemasters\Insane) pulls the chase camera out to suit the wider view; that step is optional and needs the prefix, so run the game once then RE-APPLY if it reports 'no prefix yet'.

HUD DIALS — OPTIONAL POLISH NOT YET APPLIED: the mod also un-stretches the 2D speedo/dials by repacking Data/Data.idf with IDFmaker (a Windows tool). That part isn't automated — the 3D game renders correct widescreen without it; only the dial gauges stay 4:3-proportioned. If it bothers you, run the mod's 16-10.bat on Windows against the game folder once (it's on the NAS at X:\_games\1NSANE) and the repacked Data.idf will deploy with the game.

CONTROLLER: native gamepad support — Steam Input's default layout works.
notes:
Built 2026-07-21 from Tony's GOG copy at NAS _games/1NSANE (goggame markers — DRM-free, delisted). Launch exe Game.exe (0.9MB). Patch 2 already applied (patch2.txt present) — the widescreen mod's prerequisite.

WIDESCREEN mod = Bayron/Black_Lotus (PCGW community file #27), Tony sourced '1nsane widescreen mod.zip' 2026-07-21. It's aspect-specific; we use the 16-10 set for the Deck's 1280x800. Staged OFF-GIT to NAS _recipes/1nsane/payload/widescreen/: just the patched Game.exe (sha256 4542...883ED, vs stock 441D...9DF34). copy_files overlays it (backup .gfm-orig); NAS _games copy stays clean. Camera reg via wine_registry (values dword:02000000 = 33554432, faithful to the mod's camera1.reg; targets Wow6432Node for the 32-bit game).

NOT automated: the mod's Data.idf repack (extract with IDFmaker.exe -x, swap arrosped.png + dials.cfg, repack) — that fixes only the 2D HUD dials. IDFmaker is a headless-unfriendly 2000-era tool; won't run it blind and risk a corrupt archive. Game.exe alone gives correct widescreen 3D. Documented as an optional 'run 16-10.bat on Windows' step. Non-Steam -> computed appid. UNTESTED.
